hero_desc: Your support helps me continue building free tools, open-source projects, and content for the dev community. Every contribution makes a difference. 💜
sec_projects_sub: Some of the tools, scripts, and open-source projects I've developed.
duotools_desc: Utility extension for Duolingo with exercise automation, XP farming, and Super mode features access.
idealcalc_desc: Web calculator that estimates the amount of people in a region of Brazil that fit your ideal romantic profile.
discord_desc: 100% Portuguese script that automates the completion of Orb Missions on Discord, doing the tasks automatically for you.
github_desc: Automation via GitHub Actions that generates commits automatically in private repositories to keep your contribution graph active.
sec_ways_sub: Choose your preferred way — any amount or gesture is highly welcome!
pix_desc: Instant transfer with no fees. The fastest way to contribute within Brazil.
paypal_desc: Support via PayPal from anywhere in the world or become a monthly supporter via GitHub Sponsors.
crypto_desc: I accept BTC, ETH, and SOL. Decentralized, borderless, and fully anonymous.
crypto_notice: Click on an address to display its QR Code
free_desc: No money? No problem! There are equally valuable ways to help the project.
free_1: ⭐ Give a star on GitHub repos
free_2: 🔁 Share my projects with other devs
free_5: 📝 Contribute with code — PRs are welcome!
free_6: 🗣️ Talk about my work on social media
quote: "Every line of code I write is made with much care for the community. Your support — financial or just a GitHub star — motivates me to keep creating tools that make devs' lives easier and more fun."
sec_sup_sub: Thank you to all the amazing people who made this possible. 💜
sup_notice: Want your name here? Send the receipt and desired name to donate@asterdev.me or via Discord (douglasluiz).
sup_empty: // Be the first to support! Your name will appear here. 🌟
footer_copy: © 2026 Aster Dev · Made with tiredness and hunger
modal_li_1: Click the button above to download the official Duo-Tools.zip file of the latest version.
modal_li_2: Extract (unzip) the downloaded .zip file into an easily accessible folder on your computer.
modal_li_3: Open Chrome and navigate to chrome://extensions
modal_li_4: Enable Developer mode (toggle in the top right corner)
modal_li_6: Select the Duo-Tools folder you just extracted (⚠️ Attention: select the unzipped folder, not the .zip file).
modal_li_7: Done! The extension will appear with a dark owl icon with amber/orange details in your toolbar.
